title: Walk-in Drive Medical Officer at Torrent Pharmaceuticals Consulting Pvt Ltd

jsonLd.title: Walk-in Drive Medical Officer at Torrent Pharmaceuticals Consulting Pvt Ltd
jsonLd.description:
We at Torrent Pharmaceuticals Consulting Pvt Ltd are looking for an experienced Medical Officer based out of Hyderabad. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Torrent Pharmaceuticals Consulting Pvt Ltd:
Torrent Pharmaceuticals Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in Health Informatics

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Hyderabad, Telangana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Torrent Pharmaceuticals Consulting Pvt Ltd!
